name: ml-archer
description: Tomography-first ML architecture analysis with an explicit Lean/mathlib verification addon.

interface.shortDescription: Tomography first, formal verification only by explicit opt-in
interface.longDescription: Default flow is typed architecture tomography. Lean and mathlib verification stay in a separate addon for narrow subclaims and never replace structural analysis.
defaultPrompt: Map this ML architecture into typed states, operators, losses, and shortcut risks
Audit this training graph for reachability gaps, invariants, and train infer drift
Use Lean or mathlib only for narrow claims that I explicitly ask to verify
